response.justification: This candidate possesses exceptional technical capabilities across all required and nice-to-have skills (TypeScript, React, Node.js, AWS, Kubernetes, TDD). However, they are a Staff/Senior engineer with 15+ years of experience applying for an entry-level position, creating a severe seniority mismatch and significant retention risk. They will almost certainly outgrow the role quickly, demand senior-level compensation, and leave for more challenging work within months.
strengths: Extensive production TypeScript, React, and Node.js expertise across multiple companies and scales
Strong architectural foundation with explicit focus on clean code, testing, and software craftsmanship (TDD, CI/CD)
Full-stack capability with DevOps/infrastructure knowledge (Docker, Kubernetes, AWS CDK, microservices)
concerns: Severe overqualification—staff-level engineer applying for junior role creates high flight risk and compensation expectations mismatch
No domain experience in renewable energy, construction technology, or related fields
PostgreSQL not explicitly mentioned; primary database experience appears to be MongoDB, suggesting relational databases may not be core strength

key_factors.factor: Technical Skills Coverage (Perfect Match on All Requirements)
